t.description: Time points (in days) at which channel reliability is evaluated.

sensor_failure_rate.description: Failure rate of each individual sensor per day (lambda = 0.001/day).

common_cause_failure_rate.description: Common-cause failure rate of all sensors in a channel per day (lambda_c = 0.0005/day).

num_sensors_per_channel.description: Number of identical sensors in each channel.

sensor_voting_threshold.description: Minimum number of sensors that must register dangerous radioactivity for the channel to register it (2-out-of-3 voting logic).

channel_reliability.description: Computed channel reliability at various time points, representing the probability that the channel functions correctly.
